COMMANDS ── (k) PALETTE · (i) IMPORT · (r) REFRESH · (?) HELP

SHORTCUTS ARE SINGLE KEYS. NO MODIFIERS.

    [enter] run · [esc] close

    IMPORT ── ACCOUNTS

    BACKEND /dashboard/api/import IS v1.1 (404 TODAY). USE CLI:

    $ kiroxy import-json < tokens.json

    [esc] close

    SHORTCUTS

     k  open command palette
 i  open import pane
 r  refresh snapshot
 ?  toggle this help
ESC close any pane

    [esc] close
    kiroxy brutal // data: /dashboard/api/state poll 2s │ cf. htop, plan9/acme, aws cli --output table
